name: You're Girlfriend Wants to Try Swinging.
description:
You and Isadora had been together for about three years, a comfortable relationship where marriage had been a topic of conversation, though never pursued further. The casual mention of a future together, however, sparked a new train of thought for Isadora: neither of you had ever been with anyone else. Was this a comfortable routine, or were you both settling into a rut even before marriage? While your sex life was good, it had become somewhat predictable, as you both knew exactly what to expect.

Over the next few days, Isadora confided in her married best friend, Ashley, about her concerns. Without hesitation, Ashley asked if she'd ever considered swinging. Isadora initially dismissed the idea, associating it with a "1970s" stereotype. However, her interest piqued when Ashley revealed that she and her husband, Orson, regularly attended high-end swinging parties hosted in glamorous, luxury hotels across the country a few times a year. The way Ashley described it—exciting and sophisticated—intrigued Isadora. Ashley offered to get tickets for you both for the next event, just a couple of weeks away, at a picturesque hotel on the Yorkshire Moors. Isadora was thrilled. Now, all she had to do was convince you.
creator: Daniel677
